title: Totem of undying Shirahoshi
description: Pixel Art Totem of Undying inspired by Princess Shirahoshi Grace of the deep ocean. This Shirahoshi totem shimmers with mermaid elegance, coral hues, and a smile that can calm any storm.
body:
## 🏴‍☠️ One Piece Totem Texture Pack – *Straw Hat Soul Edition*
**By DeathBusterX**


<details>
<summary>Totem Preview</summary>

![Shirahoshi Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c3411eef95ede5b8ebf30ac729ff02132af6892.png)

</details>



### 🧜 Straw Hat Totem – Shirahoshi

Pixel Art **Totem of Undying** inspired by **Princess Shirahoshi**
Grace of the deep ocean. This **Shirahoshi totem** shimmers with mermaid elegance, coral hues, and a smile that can calm any storm.

- **Theme**: Anime, Ocean, One Piece
- **Style**: Elegant pixel detail
- **Compatible**: Minecraft Java Edition (1.13-1.21+)
- **Resolution**: 32x

---

Follow me **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/totemfactorydbx?igsh=bm03bHh4emFoZDhy)** for latest texturepack drop!!

---

---


<details>
<summary>🎮 What This Pack Does</summary>
  
This texture pack replaces the **Totem of Undying** with **custom pixel-art versions of characters from One Piece**. The current release includes **Shirahoshi**, with future updates adding the full Straw Hat Crew and more iconic pirates!

Totem visuals now reflect the power of legendary pirates – no more vanilla totems!

</details>

---


<details>
<summary>✨ Features</summary>

* 🧙 Custom **Totem of Undying** texture: **Shirahoshi**
* 🎨 Faithful-style (32x) pixel art
* 📦 Works on **all Minecraft versions from 1.13 to 1.21+**
* 🧩 Fully optimized `.zip` format, no modloader needed

</details>



---


<details>
<summary>📥 Installation Guide</summary>

**Vanilla Minecraft (No Mods):**

1. Download the `.zip` file.
2. Open Minecraft → `Options` → `Resource Packs` → `Open Pack Folder`.
3. Move the `.zip` file into the folder.
4. In Minecraft, enable the pack and enjoy!

</details>



---


<details>
<summary>🔧 Technical Info</summary>

| Property         | Value                    |
| ---------------- | -------------------------|
| Pack Format      | 9-99 (Minecraft 1.13+)   |
| Texture Modified | `totem_of_undying.png`   |
| Compatible       | Java Edition 1.13-1.21+  |
| Resolution       | 32x                      |


</details>
